page_content:
Formerly: ENCH468.

CHBE469 Special Projects (1-3 Credits)

Special project under the direction of a faculty member. Comprehensive reports are required.

Restriction: Permission of Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering Department; and must be third or fourth year student; and must have minimum GPA of 3.0; and must have successfully completed all lower level engineering, science and mathematics courses for the major. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
